content: The bot should provide specific escalation contacts (IT helpdesk email, phone number, Slack channel) instead of vaguely saying 'contact the IT department'.
The response is too terse and ignores the urgency. Should acknowledge the time pressure, provide step-by-step troubleshooting, and offer a fallback like using Slack web.
After multiple messages the bot still couldn't provide any actionable help. It should know the Google Workspace admin contact or at least the IT support ticket system.
